positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~health_consious_home(taylor)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~disregard_wellbeing(taylor)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~eat_salads_regularly(taylor)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    ~eat_salads_regularly(X0) | conscious(X0)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~disregard_wellbeing(X0) | ~conscious(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~health_consious_home(X0) | eat_salads_regularly(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define fulfill_nutrition(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define gym_visit(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
